$comment: Accepted-state baseline for the weekly Supabase Advisors review task. The weekly task diffs live Advisors output against this file and alerts on ANY delta in EITHER direction: a NEW finding (drift) OR the disappearance of a ratified exception (a well-intentioned 'fix' that breaks a load-bearing design, e.g. moving a Category-B WITH CHECK(true) to service_role and collapsing the Fork H-a audit wall). Silent when live == baseline. This file is the source of truth for 'accepted state' and changes ONLY through a reviewed commit + broker countersignature, never via the monitoring task (standing-ruling-#3 discipline applied to the compliance record). Every entry carries its authorizing ruling so the record is legible cold (standing ruling #1 refined, one layer down).

accepted.authorizing_ruling: 2026-06-20 geocode audit schema design ruling / Fork H-a
accepted.rationale: Load-bearing 'app can append, cannot read' audit wall: anon INSERT-only policy pairs with deliberately-absent SELECT so a request-path compromise cannot exfiltrate input_address; service_role stays operator-only.

accepted.authorizing_ruling: 2026-06-20 geocode audit schema design ruling / Fork H-a (migration 011)
accepted.rationale: Same app-INSERT-only wall; synchronous disposition row written by the request path under the append-only anon capability.

accepted.authorizing_ruling: 2026-06-20 classifier persistence-lock conflict ruling / Fork H-a
accepted.rationale: Append-only audit wall; app appends classifier decisions, cannot read them back.
Append-only audit wall; rate-limit events append-only from the request path.

accepted.authorizing_ruling: 2026-06-20 audit-durability ruling / Fork H-a; base-table INSERT distinct from the 2026-06-30 aging-view leak fix (025b, intact)
accepted.rationale: Trigger-fed append-only wall; anon cannot SELECT the base table; the read leak was on the aging view and remains locked (security_invoker + service_role SELECT).
Supabase-managed default; backs pg_cron HTTP (parcel-health/RTC/city-refresh). Moving risks net.* breakage; scoped future migration, no acute risk.
RLS on + no policy = deny-all for anon/authenticated; service-role/owner only. Correct fail-closed posture.
Deny-all fail-closed lockdown; audit-durability table, service-role only.
Deny-all fail-closed lockdown; broker export tooling (service-role) only.
Deny-all fail-closed lockdown; broker actions store, service-role only.
Deny-all fail-closed lockdown; rent-control cron (service-role) writes.
Deny-all fail-closed lockdown; rent-control cron state, service-role only.
Deny-all fail-closed lockdown; audit_cliff run history, service-role only.
Remediated from RLS-off to deny-all lockdown; FF-3 disposition store, service-role only.

accepted.authorizing_ruling: 2026-06-29 capstone ruling §155/§179 + gate-2 packet; grant tidy 055
accepted.rationale: Deny-all fail-closed lockdown; server-side redeem via service_role; no public policy authorized.
Deny-all fail-closed lockdown; parcel-health cron/edge (service-role) writes.
Deny-all fail-closed lockdown; LA RTC cron (service-role) writes.
Deny-all fail-closed lockdown; section-8 monitor (service-role) writes.

pending.rationale: Broker enabling via Auth dashboard toggle; expected to clear. Not an accepted exception — pending. If still present at first task run, surfaces as a correct reminder. Removed from this file in the same commit that records the toggle.
